tools.name: about_sftunes
tools.description: What SFtunes is, how x402 payment works, and the tapemaker revenue split. Free.

tools.name: list_tapes
tools.description: Index of all public SFtunes mixtapes: id, title, tapemaker handle, track_count. Costs $0.01 USDC per call via x402.

tools.name: get_tape
tools.description: One public SFtunes mixtape by tape_id (uuid): title, description, tapemaker, ordered tracks with artist/title/liner note and canonical Spotify/Apple/YouTube links. Costs $0.01 USDC per call via x402; 80% goes to the tapemaker.
